title: Azur PVP
description: Experience lag-free combat with Sodium and Lithium, ensuring the highest FPS even during intense fights. MouseTweaks lets you swap your gear in an instant. All while Fullbright lets you see more then ever before in the best PVP experience you've ever had!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9787b3c6385456f7a53d94253eb26dd09e9532d6.png)A lightweight and optimized modpack tailored for competitive PvP gameplay. Featuring essential Quality of Life (QoL) and performance mods to give you a smooth and responsive experience in battles.

This modpack excludes any tools or features that could lead to unfair advantages, ensuring compliance with server rules and a fair PvP environment. Perfect for arenas, minigames, and duels!

Fight, strategize, and dominate with precision in an optimized PvP setup!

Have fun! :D
